services.name: Event Hubs
services.description: Ingests real-time streaming data for multi-modal processing

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Processes text and vision inputs using GPT-4 and DALL-E models

services.name: Speech Services
services.description: Performs real-time speech-to-text transcription and text-to-speech synthesis

services.name: Translator
services.description: Provides multilingual translation for text and transcribed speech

services.name: Computer Vision
services.description: Analyzes images and video frames for object detection and OCR

services.name: Application Insights
services.description: Monitors model performance, latency, and usage telemetry

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Central observability hub for the AI platform

connections.label: Streams text and vision events for AI inference
Routes audio streams for real-time transcription
Sends transcribed text for multilingual translation
Feeds translated text as enriched context to LLM
Provides extracted visual features for multi-modal reasoning
Forwards image and video frames for analysis
Emits model invocation metrics and token usage telemetry
Forwards application telemetry to central monitoring hub
Routes aggregated logs and metrics for query and analysis

workflow.description: Multi-modal data (text, audio, images) is ingested into Event Hubs as streaming events.
Event Hubs routes audio streams to Speech Services for real-time transcription and image/video frames to Computer Vision for analysis.
Speech Services transcribes audio and sends the text to Translator for multilingual conversion.
Translated text and visual features from Computer Vision are sent to Azure OpenAI as enriched context.
Azure OpenAI performs multi-modal reasoning combining text, translated content, and visual features to generate a response.
Azure OpenAI emits invocation metrics, token usage, and latency data to Application Insights.
Application Insights forwards telemetry to Azure Monitor, which routes aggregated logs to Log Analytics for querying and dashboarding.

metadata.prompt: A multi-modal AI platform with Azure OpenAI for text and vision, Azure AI Speech for real-time transcription, Azure AI Translator for multilingual support, Event Hubs for streaming ingest, and Application Insights for model observability
